title: MTR Austrian Express Collection 1 Pack [BETA Phase]
description: The pack adds ÖBB Trains from Austria and in the future there will be more ÖBB trains
body:
🚆 Presenting the Austrian Express Collection 1 – Pack  🇦🇹
This pack brings together a true variety of Austrian railway icons in one high-quality bundle:

    🚉 ÖBB 4020 – A classic EMU that shaped daily commuter life in Austria for decades.

    🚄 ÖBB 5047 – The iconic regional DMU for branch lines and countryside journeys.

    🚅 ÖBB 4746 "Cityjet and Ventus" – Austria’s modern answer to comfort, design, and urban mobility.

    🚂 ÖBB 1144 – The powerhouse of the Alps, perfectly suited for both freight and passenger services.

    🚃 Domestic Intercity Coaches – Authentic inlandsreise passenger wagons to complete the set.

All models are carefully crafted with realistic proportions, sounds, and liveries – ideal for any Austrian railway fan or MTR modder. Whether you’re recreating regional routes or modern express services, this collection gives you everything you need to bring Austria’s rails to life!

🎮 Available for Modrinth & fully compatible with MTR 4.0.0+.
🛠️ Designed by AndCrafter.

If you tracking some bugs. Pls send me in Bug Report on the Discord Server Link Below
